title: Senior Teacher - Schoolnet India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Schoolnet India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India family as a Senior Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!
